title: Add an update window for Groups
excerpt: It would be great to allow a general update window at Group level for general updates & comments.

posts.author: karlwilkins (Karl Wilkins)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to allow a general update window at Group level for general updates & comments.

posts.author: tibor93 (Tibor Tasi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @karlwilkins,

A workaround could be if you create a “General” group at the top of the board where you can put general items like process documentation for example.

Regards,
Tibor
